title: OCP Recovery Share Response Payload
description: Payload for a recovery_share_response message. A custodian returns their encrypted share to the recovering agent.

share_index.description: Index of the share being returned.

encrypted_share.description: Base64url AES-256-GCM encrypted share, keyed via ECDH to the requester's ephemeral key.

ephemeral_public_key.description: Base64url custodian's ephemeral X25519 public key (if custodian also uses ephemeral).
